Mtn To Dismiss
Off Calendar Feb-18-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT DYLAN HACKETT's Motion To Dismiss is Off calendar. Defendant did not file and serve his motion at least 16 court days before the hearing, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b). Moreover, the statute he asserts as a basis for his motion (Code of Civil Procedure section 583.410, delay in prosecution) does not apply.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
